name: deopuri
description: Deopuri Management System — Spring Boot backend + Vite/React frontend

scripts.backend: cd backend && ./mvnw -DskipTests -pl deopuri-api,deopuri-service install -q && cd deopuri-app && ../mvnw spring-boot:run
scripts.backend:win: cd backend && mvnw.cmd -DskipTests -pl deopuri-api,deopuri-service install -q && cd deopuri-app && ..\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules frontend/dist backend/deopuri-api/target backend/deopuri-service/target backend/deopuri-app/target
